title: Build ~100,000 new homes per year

source.document: Coalition agreement 2026–2030 'Aan de slag — Bouwen aan een beter Nederland' (D66/VVD/CDA, 30 Jan 2026)

notes: Current value is gross new dwellings added in 2024 from CBS 82235NED (Woningbouw_5): 82,204 including new construction and conversions. Coalition allocates €1B/year from 2029 and 30 designated new neighbourhoods/cities.

title: Increase defense spending to 3.5% of GDP
notes: Up from the 2% NATO floor in the 2024 agreement. Equivalent to tens of billions of euros of additional annual spending.

title: 1.5% real GDP growth per year
notes: Annual real GDP growth target intended to finance higher spending on care, education and defense without raising overall tax burden. Live tracking to be wired to CBS national accounts.

title: Reduce greenhouse-gas emissions 55% vs 1990 by 2030
notes: Current value computed from Eurostat env_air_gge total GHG emissions (excluding LULUCF and memo items): 146,441 kt CO₂eq in 2023 vs 228,103 kt in 1990. Statutory target carried over by the 2026 coalition; emission figures also published by RIVM/Emissieregistratie.

title: Statutory nitrogen reduction by 2035
notes: Headline target shown is approximate mid-point of sector-specific statutory reductions: agriculture 42–46%, industry 50%, mobility 50%. To be tracked against RIVM nitrogen-deposition data.

title: €1.5B additional structural investment in education
notes: Focus on basic literacy/numeracy, civic education, digital skills, and equality of opportunity.
